text:
*[Bug 19010] Compilation fails with Intel OneAPI 2024.2 compiler*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19010>

Martin Maechler (<mailto:maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch|maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch>) changed:

           What    |Removed                     |Added
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
                 CC|                            |maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch

--- Comment #1 from Martin Maechler (<mailto:maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch|maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch>) ---
Well, that seems like a bug on that platform or how you used `configure` there.
In theory, there's the possibility that we need to improve `<http://configure.ac|configure.ac>` or
how 
autoconf creates `configure` from that.

The source code in question now is

```c
#ifdef HAVE_ATAN2PI
        angle = 180. * atan2pi(dy, dx);
#else
        angle = (180. / M_PI) * atan2(dy, dx);
#endif
```
and that there is `atan2pi()` now, but accidentally `atan2()` previously
is really from my fix of  Bug 19007 (on my birthday, a few days ago).

Can you please try to find out _why_ the intel platform / compiler got 
`HAVE_ATAN2PI`
defined, even though it is clearly not defined per your error message?

text:
*[Bug 19003] The aarch64 Windows R build has wrong 'Built' field for base and recommended packages*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19003>

Jeroen Ooms (<mailto:jeroenooms@gmail.com|jeroenooms@gmail.com>) changed:

           What    |Removed                     |Added
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
                 CC|                            |jeroenooms@gmail.com

--- Comment #1 from Jeroen Ooms (<mailto:jeroenooms@gmail.com|jeroenooms@gmail.com>) ---
I suspect this only happens when Base-R was cross compiled. At least the
installers from <https://contributor.r-project.org/svn-dashboard/> that are built
on arm64, show a different result:

        > R.Version()$version.string
        [1] "R Under development (unstable) (2026-02-26 r89482 ucrt)"
        > R.Version()$platform
        [1] "aarch64-w64-mingw32"
        > packageDescription("stats")$Built
        [1] "R 4.6.0; aarch64-w64-mingw32; 2026-02-26 09:48:41 UTC; windows"
        > packageDescription("Matrix")$Built
        [1] "R 4.6.0; aarch64-w64-mingw32; 2025-09-01 10:45:31 UTC; windows"
